# Ramotion Theme v0.4.0

## Highlights

- Hardened theme-side DOM rendering and removed risky HTML injection paths from desk enhancements.
- Redesigned the login experience to match the Ramotion visual language across desktop and mobile.
- Refined workspace hero, sidebar branding, public landing page presentation, and mobile navigation treatments.
- Updated Ramotion Studio preview surfaces with day and night appearance switching.

## Upgrade notes

- Run `bench --site <site> migrate` after pulling the release.
- Run `bench --site <site> clear-cache` so the new CSS and JS asset versions load immediately.
- If you deploy from source, run `bench build --app ramotion_theme` to regenerate bundled assets.
